member.name: T:DoorTest.Config
member.summary: Configuration for the DoorTest plugin. Add values here to control test behaviour from server config.

member.name: P:DoorTest.Config.EnableAutoTest
member.summary: If true the plugin will run a simple auto-test when enabled (will only run server-side).

member.name: P:DoorTest.Config.TestDoorName
member.summary: Optional door name to target for automatic tests. If empty, a random door is used.

member.name: P:DoorTest.Config.LogOnEvents
member.summary: Controls whether event callbacks log to server log.

member.name: P:DoorTest.Config.AccessPermA
member.summary: Example numbers used when simulating access denied/granted screens.
